# Kiva Ecosystem 2026 Design System — full reference for AI agents

Generated 2026-07-04 from the Figma variable library (Ecosystem 2026 WIP, file TPmBUB4olYPMF6glEhBGDG). This file is the flat, machine-readable rendition of the interactive reference at https://linzhao0315.github.io/ds-ref/ .

## How to use this file

1. NEVER hardcode visual values. Every color, size, radius, spacing, and font in generated UI must map to a token named below.
2. Prefer the highest applicable layer: component token (button/*, input/*, tooltip/*) → semantic alias (text/*, background/*, border/*) → Global primitive. Use a Global primitive directly only when no alias fits (matches the Figma library convention).
3. Themes: the five Alias-Color modes (default, green-light, green-dark, marigold, stone) remap the SAME alias names. Generate against alias names, not resolved hexes, and theming works for free. In CSS use the custom properties from tokens.css and switch [data-theme].
4. Tailwind: the Kiva config prefixes utilities with tw- and maps alias names (tw-bg-primary = background/primary, tw-text-action = text/action). Spacing scale: tw-1 = 8px, tw-0.5 = 4px (NOT the default Tailwind scale). tw-rounded = 16px (NOT 4px).
5. After generating, audit your output: grep for hex colors, px values not on the 4px grain, font sizes not in the type scale, and border radii not in {0,4,8,12,16,20,24,9999}. Each hit is a defect: replace with a token.

## Component specifications

### Button (KvButton)
- 6 variants: primary, secondary, danger, link, ghost, caution. 2 sizes: default (48px fixed height) and small (32px). 5 states: default, hover, active, disabled, loading.
- Geometry: default = 24px horizontal x 8px vertical padding, radius 16, label text/button (Kiva Post Grot Medium 16/21). small = 16x4 padding, radius 8, label text/label (Medium 14/18).
- All colors per variant x state come from Mapped - Buttons (table below): the variant is the mode.
- Only secondary has a visible border (1px, border/secondary-button). Other variants carry a transparent border.
- Disabled = disabled tokens + 40% whole-button opacity (code uses tw-opacity-low). Loading = keep default background, hide label, show spinner; spinner arc color = button/color/spinner (white on primary/danger/link, black on secondary/caution, brand green on ghost); spinner track is always text/tertiary at 30%.
- Rules: one primary per view; secondary accompanies a primary; danger for destructive, caution for needs-attention, link for navigation-as-button, ghost for lowest emphasis.

### Forms (KvTextInput, KvCheckbox)
- Text input: fixed 48px height, radius 4 (input/radius), 16px horizontal padding, text/base (Book 16/22). Background background/primary, border border/tertiary (1px), focus ring border/action at 2px, error state = border/danger + background/danger-highlight + text/danger. Disabled background background/tertiary. Leading icon 24px in text/secondary.
- Checkbox: 20px box, radius 4; unchecked = background/primary + border/secondary; checked = background/action fill + border/action + checkmark text/primary-inverse; disabled background gray/200. Label text/primary; hit area extends across the label row.
- Always render a visible label (never placeholder-as-label) and pair error color with an error message.

### Tooltip (KvTooltip)
- THEME-INDEPENDENT by design: exactly two fixed neutral styles, identical across all themes. Dark chip (background #212121 gray/800, text #ffffff) for light surfaces; light chip (background #ffffff, text #212121 gray/800) for dark or photographic surfaces. Contrast 16.1:1 (AAA at any size). Darkest gray instead of pure black to avoid halation on small text.
- Geometry: radius 16, inset 20, max-width 250, 8px arrow matching the container fill, shadow 0 4 12 shadow/default. Placements: top / bottom / left / right.
- Not interactive content; shows on hover and focus, dismisses on Esc/blur; role="tooltip" + aria-describedby.

### Chips and Pills (KvChip, KvPill)
- Chip (dismissible selection): background/secondary, hover background/tertiary, radius 16, inset 16x8, text/base, 16px close icon in text/primary. It is a real button; accessible name must include the value ("Remove filter: Kenya").
- Pill (static status label): background/secondary, radius 16, inset 12x8, text/label (Medium 14/18), optional 16px leading icon. Never interactive.

### Loading (KvLoadingPlaceholder, KvLoadingSpinner)
- Placeholder (skeleton): background/tertiary base, radius 4, animated shimmer band of background/secondary (1.5s loop in code). Sized to the content it replaces. Region gets aria-busy.
- Spinner: sizes 24/32/64, 2px stroke, arc color/brand/default, track text/tertiary at 30% opacity. Inside buttons the arc follows button/color/spinner.

### Lightbox (KvLightbox)
- Modal over a #000 75% scrim (color/neutral/scrim). Container background/primary, radius 16, widths 888 (desktop) / 600 (tablet) / 320 (mobile, bottom-anchored sheet).
- Headline levels: H2 = text/headline 2 (Dovetail Medium 22/31) for celebratory moments; H3 = text/title (Grot Medium 20/26) for utilitarian dialogs. Body text/base.
- Close: 24px icon in a 48px hit area, hover text/action-highlight. Footer: up to two KvButtons (secondary + primary), right-aligned, 20px gap.
- Focus trapped inside; Esc closes; page behind is inert and scroll-locked; aria-modal="true".

### Navigation (KvNav) and Footer (KvFooter)
- Nav: white bar (nav/color/background) with bottom border border/tertiary; heights 80 (desktop/tablet) / 64 (mobile). Logo is always color/brand/default. Links are ghost-button styled, text/primary with hover text/action, type text/button (Medium 16/21). Search field uses the form input tokens with background/secondary surface. Dropdown radius 8.
- Footer: background color/gray/100 (deliberately neutral gray, not the greenish background/secondary), headings text/primary in text/label, links text/action, legal text text/secondary in text/caption, dividers border/tertiary, social icons text/tertiary. Padding 64, gaps 48/32/16/12/8 all on the spacing scale.
- Both are landmarks (<nav>, <footer>); include a skip-to-content link; basket count announced via aria-label.

### Avatar (KvUserAvatar) and Icons
- Avatar: full circle (radius/max), 48px base size scaling with context. Anonymous = color/brand/default circle + white Kiva K (60% height). Letter = background/action + first initial. Image = photo clipped to circle, alt "Image of lender".
- KvMaterialIcon: 24px, fill-current — icons ALWAYS inherit the parent text color and have no tokens of their own. Do not invent icon color tokens.

## Full token tables

### Collection: Global

| token | value | resolves to |
|---|---|---|
| `type/font-family/serif` | Dovetail MVB |  |
| `type/font-family/sans` | Kiva Post Grot |  |
| `type/font-weight/normal` | Book |  |
| `type/font-weight/medium` | Medium |  |
| `type/font-size/jumbo/lg` | 44 |  |
| `type/font-size/jumbo/md` | 40 |  |
| `type/font-size/jumbo/sm` | 36 |  |
| `type/font-size/h1/lg` | 26 |  |

| `type/font-size/h1/sm` | 22 |  |

| `type/font-size/h2/sm` | 20 |  |

| `type/font-size/h3/sm` | 18 |  |
| `type/font-size/base/base` | 16 |  |
| `type/font-size/button/button` | 16 |  |
| `type/font-size/small/small` | 14 |  |
| `type/line-height/jumbo/lg` | 57 |  |

### Collection: Alias - Color

| token | default | green-light | green-dark | marigold | stone |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `text/primary` | #223829 | #223829 | #edf4f1 | #593207 | #2e271e |
| `text/primary-inverse` | #edf4f1 | #edf4f1 | #223829 | #f8f2e6 | #f3f1ef |
| `text/secondary` | #505050 | #505050 | #c4c4c4 | #505050 | #505050 |
| `text/secondary-button` | #212121 | #212121 | #edf4f1 | #593207 | #635544 |
| `text/tertiary` | #757575 | #757575 | #e0e0e0 | #757575 | #757575 |

### Collection: Alias - Text/Spacing/Layout

| token | desktop (xl) | desktop (lg) | tablet (md) | mobile (sm) | mobile (xs) |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `text/display/font-family` | {Global::type/font-family/serif} | {Global::type/font-family/serif} | {Global::type/font-family/serif} | {Global::type/font-family/serif} | {Global::type/font-family/serif} |
| `text/display/font-size` | {Global::type/font-size/jumbo/lg} | {Global::type/font-size/jumbo/lg} | {Global::type/font-size/jumbo/md} | {Global::type/font-size/jumbo/sm} | {Global::type/font-size/jumbo/sm} |
| `text/display/font-weight` | {Global::type/font-weight/medium} | {Global::type/font-weight/medium} | {Global::type/font-weight/medium} | {Global::type/font-weight/medium} | {Global::type/font-weight/medium} |
| `text/display/line-height` | {Global::type/line-height/jumbo/lg} | {Global::type/line-height/jumbo/lg} | {Global::type/line-height/jumbo/md} | {Global::type/line-height/jumbo/sm} | {Global::type/line-height/jumbo/sm} |
| `text/display/letter-spacing` | {Global::type/letter-spacing/-600} | {Global::type/letter-spacing/-600} | {Global::type/letter-spacing/-500} | {Global::type/letter-spacing/-400} | {Global::type/letter-spacing/-400} |
| `text/headline 1/font-family` | {Global::type/font-family/serif} | {Global::type/font-family/serif} | {Global::type/font-family/serif} | {Global::type/font-family/serif} | {Global::type/font-family/serif} |
| `text/headline 1/font-size` | {Global::type/font-size/h1/lg} | {Global::type/font-size/h1/lg} | {Global::type/font-size/h1/md} | {Global::type/font-size/h1/sm} | {Global::type/font-size/h1/sm} |
| `text/headline 1/font-weight` | {Global::type/font-weight/medium} | {Global::type/font-weight/medium} | {Global::type/font-weight/medium} | {Global::type/font-weight/medium} | {Global::type/font-weight/medium} |
| `text/headline 1/line-height` | {Global::type/line-height/h1/lg} | {Global::type/line-height/h1/lg} | {Global::type/line-height/h1/md} | {Global::type/line-height/h1/sm} | {Global::type/line-height/h1/sm} |
| `text/headline 1/letter-spacing` | {Global::type/letter-spacing/-300} | {Global::type/letter-spacing/-300} | {Global::type/letter-spacing/-200} | {Global::type/letter-spacing/-200} | {Global::type/letter-spacing/-200} |
| `text/headline 2/font-family` | {Global::type/font-family/serif} | {Global::type/font-family/serif} | {Global::type/font-family/serif} | {Global::type/font-family/serif} | {Global::type/font-family/serif} |
| `text/headline 2/font-size` | {Global::type/font-size/h2/lg} | {Global::type/font-size/h2/lg} | {Global::type/font-size/h2/md} | {Global::type/font-size/h2/sm} | {Global::type/font-size/h2/sm} |
| `text/headline 2/font-weight` | {Global::type/font-weight/medium} | {Global::type/font-weight/medium} | {Global::type/font-weight/medium} | {Global::type/font-weight/medium} | {Global::type/font-weight/medium} |
| `text/headline 2/line-height` | {Global::type/line-height/h2/lg} | {Global::type/line-height/h2/lg} | {Global::type/line-height/h2/md} | {Global::type/line-height/h2/sm} | {Global::type/line-height/h2/sm} |
| `text/headline 2/letter-spacing` | {Global::type/letter-spacing/-200} | {Global::type/letter-spacing/-200} | {Global::type/letter-spacing/-100} | {Global::type/letter-spacing/-100} | {Global::type/letter-spacing/-100} |
| `text/subheadline/font-family` | {Global::type/font-family/sans} | {Global::type/font-family/sans} | {Global::type/font-family/sans} | {Global::type/font-family/sans} | {Global::type/font-family/sans} |
| `text/subheadline/font-size` | {Global::type/font-size/h3/lg} | {Global::type/font-size/h3/lg} | {Global::type/font-size/h3/md} | {Global::type/font-size/h3/sm} | {Global::type/font-size/h3/sm} |

### Collection: Alias - Radius

| token | value | resolves to |
|---|---|---|
| `none` | {Global::radius/0} | 0 |
| `xs` | {Global::radius/100} | 4 |
| `sm` | {Global::radius/200} | 8 |
| `md` | {Global::radius/300} | 12 |
| `base` | {Global::radius/400} | 16 |
| `lg` | {Global::radius/500} | 20 |
| `xl` | {Global::radius/600} | 24 |
| `full` | {Global::radius/max} | 9999 |

### Collection: Alias - Border

| token | width | dash | gap |
|---|---|---|---|
| `solid/default` | 1 | 1 | 1 |
| `solid/hover` | 1 | None | None |
| `solid/active` | 1 | None | None |
| `solid/emphasis` | 2 | 2 | 2 |
| `dashed/dashed` | 2 | 4 | 2 |
| `solid/secondary-disabled` | 1 | 0 | 0 |

### Collection: Alias - Elevation

| token | y | Blur | Spread | Opacity |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `default` | 4 | 12 | 0 | 0.08 |
| `hover` | 4 | 16 | 0 | 0.16 |
| `click-active` | 4 | 12 | 0 | 0.08 |
